overview: Word to Go is a fun, visually engaging reading app for children ages 3–7. Kids learn phonics through flashcards, letter and word tracing, blending exercises, and matching quizzes — all with a sleek black luxury theme and real phonics audio.
features: Letter flashcards A–Z with alphabetical pronunciation
260 phonics blending exercises with user-supplied audio (a–t) and speech synthesis fallback
Letter and word tracing with random words from 260-word library
Matching quiz with 3 levels (uppercase/lowercase, word matching, emoji-to-word)
Visual Learning section for future videos and audios
Up to 3 child profiles with local progress tracking
Black luxury theme with gold and white accents
